clinch.title: Clinch
clinch.descriptionMarkdown:
Neutral standing tie-up.

- Win inside control
- Keep head position
- Enter takedown or pull guard

single_leg_takedown.title: Single Leg Takedown
single_leg_takedown.descriptionMarkdown:
Attack one leg and run the pipe or finish to the mat.

Common outcomes are top half guard or side control.

double_leg_takedown.title: Double Leg Takedown
double_leg_takedown.descriptionMarkdown:
Level change, penetrate, connect hands, and drive through.

Try to land in a strong passing position.

guard_pull.title: Guard Pull
guard_pull.descriptionMarkdown:
Pull opponent into your guard with grips and posture control.

Use this to enter closed guard or 50-50.

closed_guard.title: Closed Guard
closed_guard.descriptionMarkdown:
Strong bottom control with legs locked.

- Break posture
- Angle hips
- Chain sweeps and submissions

half_guard.title: Half Guard
half_guard.descriptionMarkdown:
One of opponent's legs trapped.

Can be used to recover guard, sweep, or get passed by pressure passing.

side_control.title: Side Control
side_control.descriptionMarkdown:
Chest-to-chest top control.

- Crossface and underhook
- Control hips
- Transition to mount, kesa, or north-south

mount.title: Mount
mount.descriptionMarkdown:
Dominant top position.

- Knees tight
- Heavy hips
- Attack armbar or force defensive reactions

north_south.title: North-South
north_south.descriptionMarkdown:
Top control with torso over opponent's head.

Use to stabilize and isolate arms for submissions.

kesa_gatame.title: Kesa Gatame
kesa_gatame.descriptionMarkdown:
Scarf-hold side control variation.

Strong pinning position with pressure and transitions back to mount or side.

fifty_fifty.title: 50-50 Guard
fifty_fifty.descriptionMarkdown:
Symmetric leg entanglement.

Entries to straight ankle lock, sweeps, or disengagement back to upper-body guard.

knee_cut_pass.title: Knee Cut Pass
knee_cut_pass.descriptionMarkdown:
Classic pressure pass through half/open guard.

Crossface, staple, cut knee through to side control or mount.

toreando_pass.title: Toreando Pass
toreando_pass.descriptionMarkdown:
Bullfighter pass around the legs.

Move hips laterally and circle to side control or kesa.

scissor_sweep.title: Scissor Sweep
scissor_sweep.descriptionMarkdown:
Closed/open guard sweep using push-pull and shin frame.

Finish by coming up to mount.

hip_bump_sweep.title: Hip Bump Sweep
hip_bump_sweep.descriptionMarkdown:
Sit-up sweep to off-balance opponent posturing up.

Can chain into kimura if they base hard.

butterfly_sweep.title: Butterfly Sweep
butterfly_sweep.descriptionMarkdown:
Elevate and tilt with butterfly hooks.

Use angle and upper-body control to come on top.

kimura.title: Kimura
kimura.descriptionMarkdown:
Figure-four shoulder lock from multiple positions.

Can finish submission or force transitions to dominant top positions.

triangle_choke.title: Triangle Choke
triangle_choke.descriptionMarkdown:
One-arm-in, one-arm-out leg choke.

Cut angle, lock legs, and finish with posture control.

armbar_from_mount.title: Armbar From Mount
armbar_from_mount.descriptionMarkdown:
Isolate an arm from mount and fall to the side for extension.

Pinch knees and control thumb line.

straight_ankle_lock.title: Straight Ankle Lock
straight_ankle_lock.descriptionMarkdown:
Basic leg lock often accessed from 50-50 or ashi-style entanglements.

Control heel line and apply pressure through hips.

mount_escape_elbow_knee.title: Mount Escape (Elbow-Knee)
mount_escape_elbow_knee.descriptionMarkdown:
Defensive escape from bottom mount.

Create frames, shrimp, insert knee, and recover half or closed guard.

side_control_escape_shrimp.title: Side Control Escape (Shrimp)
side_control_escape_shrimp.descriptionMarkdown:
Defensive movement to recover guard from side control.

Frame at neck/hip, shrimp, and re-guard.
